<!-- Thanks for contributing a recipe! Please complete this checklist. -->

## What this PR adds

<!-- Briefly describe the recipe: what does the agent do, who's it for? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I copied `recipes/_template.json` and filled in all required fields
- [ ] The filename matches the recipe's `id` field (e.g. `vapi-foo-bar.json` ↔ `"id": "vapi-foo-bar"`)
- [ ] I added a `github_source_url` pointing to a public, working repository or file
- [ ] My vendor names match the canonical list in `data/vendors.json` (or I'm adding them in this PR)
- [ ] If my prompt is longer than ~200 words, I put it in `recipes/prompts/{slug}.md` and referenced it via `prompt_file`
- [ ] I validated locally with `npm run validate` (optional but appreciated)
- [ ] I'm okay with this recipe being published under [CC-BY 4.0](../LICENSE-DATA) on speechstack.com

## Source attribution

<!--
Where did this recipe come from?
- "I built this myself" → great, you're the contributor
- "I'm submitting on behalf of [vendor/company]" → please confirm you have permission
- "I found this in a public showcase / blog / video" → please link the original and confirm the original author is okay with republication
-->

<!-- Edge cases, tradeoffs, things that surprised you during the build. -->
